---
title: "Salinity / pH / EC Methods"
---

This toolbox area includes rapid methods and sensors used to screen the chemical condition of soil, especially for salinity-related and acidity-related questions.

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| **What it is** | A group of rapid field or near-field methods for basic soil chemical screening. |
| **Main purpose** | To assess salinity-related issues and general chemical condition. |
| **Where used** | Field, near-field, laboratory |
| **Typical users** | Farmers, advisors, researchers, field teams |
| **Typical outputs** | pH, EC, salinity/TDS and related screening values |

## Main target variables

- pH,
- electrical conductivity,
- salinity / TDS,
- and related chemical screening variables.

## Descriptor groups supported

- salinity,
- acidity,
- nutrient-related screening,
- and general soil-chemistry interpretation.
